column2: Authoring source for every provider adapter wrapper in kit/.
kit/.agent-kit/catalog.txt from this file. CI fails if the payload has drifted from it.
Tab-separated. Empty columns are written as a single "-".
kind      one of: workflow | skill | role
name      file/slug name; workflows also need kit/.agent-kit/workflows/<name>.md
title     used as "Execute the canonical <title> with ..."
also      extra canonical file the wrapper must read (workflows), or "refs" for skills
tools     Claude subagent tool list (roles only)
claude_note / codex_note   extra sentence appended to the wrapper body
